Good at managing a steady flow of requests and turning work around without a lot of hand-holding. Clear communicator. You'll be working alongside another designer and a small marketing team, so being easy to collaborate with matters. The details Part-time, roughly 15 to 20 hours a week to start, with potential to grow.

title: Real Estate Social Images
desc: I have several high-quality renderings and site plans for a new commercial development and I want them turned into polished, single-image posts formatted specifically for Facebook. The core material is already finished; what I need is your creative touch to crop, balance colours, and lay out each image so it commands attention in the feed and looks cohesive with our existing brand style. You’ll receive the raw JPEGs/PDFs along with our colour palette and logo files. Using Photoshop, Illustrator or your preferred design tool, please: • optimise each image for Facebook’s recommended 1200×630 resolution, • keep text (if any) within the 20 % rule so reach isn’t penalised, and • export final files as both high-res PNG and an editable source file. I’m looking for a quick turnaround—once I hand over the assets, a first draft within two days and final revisions shortly after would be ideal. If you have ideas for subtle text overlays or light visual enhancements that elevate the posts without cluttering the architectural detail, feel free to propose them. Send over a couple of samples of similar marketing imagery you’ve produced, and let me know how soon you can start.

title: Single Instagram giveaway ad design
desc: We are looking for a designer/marketer to create a single Instagram promotional advertisement for AGA Builders. This is one standalone design (one ad), intended for a giveaway campaign aimed at increasing brand awareness, engagement, and growing the company’s Instagram audience. Giveaway Details: * One winner will be selected and will receive a free kitchen remodel (complete kitchen renovation) provided by AGA Builders. * To enter the giveaway, participants must: * Follow the AGA Builders Instagram account. * Submit their Full Name. * Submit their Home Address. * Submit their Email Address. Requirements: * Create one high-quality Instagram advertisement post (single design). * The ad must clearly explain the giveaway and all entry requirements. * Include a strong and clear call-to-action. * The design should look professional, modern, and reflect a trustworthy construction company brand. * The ad should be optimized for Instagram feed use (and adaptable for stories if needed). Objective: The goal is to increase engagement, generate leads, and grow the AGA Builders Instagram following through this single promotional post.

This is a freelance position focusing on our long-form podcasts, deep-dive reporting, and short-form video content. title: (Social Media) Graphic Designer
desc: LinkedIn Graphic Designer – Social Media Visuals (preferably Europe-based) We're looking for a talented graphic designer to create high-quality LinkedIn visuals for our brand on an ongoing basis. What you'll do: - Design 15–25 LinkedIn visuals per week - Work within an established template framework (layout, typography, brand style provided) - Adapt each visual with 3 icons/symbols or items + predefined copy — delivered by us - Bring genuine design thinking to each piece, not just drag-and-drop execution What we're looking for: - A designer who understands composition, visual hierarchy, and brand consistency - Someone who can work efficiently within a template system without producing AI-only output - Europe-based or within European time zones (CET ±2h preferred) - Experience with LinkedIn content or B2B social media is a plus What we provide: - Brand guidelines and master templates - All copy and icons/assets per visual - Clear weekly briefs Please include in your application: - Portfolio with LinkedIn or social media design examples - Your typical turnaround time for a batch of 15–20 visuals - Tools you work with (Figma, Adobe, etc.) This is an ongoing role with regular weekly volume.

title: Academic Figure Designer Needed for Publication-Quality Conceptual Framework Illustration
desc: Project Overview I am seeking an experienced designer to transform an existing conceptual framework into a professional, publication-ready figure for a journal article. The framework has already been developed conceptually. Your role will be to redesign and visually elevate the figure while preserving its theoretical structure and relationships. The goal is to create a high-quality academic illustration that is visually appealing, easy to interpret, and suitable for submission to a reputable peer-reviewed journal. What I Will Provide * The current version of the framework * A few sample figures for inspiration and reference * Any necessary explanations regarding the framework structure Please note that the provided samples are intended only as references. I am looking for a final design that is equal to or better than those examples in terms of visual quality, clarity, and professionalism. The final figure should: * be publication-quality and suitable for academic journals * have a clean, modern, and professional appearance * improve visual hierarchy, readability, and overall aesthetics * maintain all existing concepts and relationships * be suitable for both journal articles and conference presentations * use a high-quality vector-based design approach Applicants with experience

title: Adobe Lightroom - 300,000 images
desc: We have 300,000 images (131 GB) of files that we need to process using Adobe Lightroom software. In other words, we will forward these images (zip) to you along with the presets and you will process these in Adobe Lightroom software and produce 300,000 images and send me back in the form of zip. Please BID if you have done something this scale before. Thank you!

title: Arcade Cabinet Graphics Suite
desc: I’m creating an arcade cabinet. I have templates for the left and right sides of the machine, the marquee, the controller area and the front bottom in psd format. I also have a logo I created in png format. Using the supplied templates and logo, create the following deliverables: • Side panel artwork - take logo and enlarge as much as possible and set with a cyan blue background • Control panel overlay and marquee - take logo and make horizontal (like attached example) and set on a lime green background • Front bottom graphic - take logo and enlarge as much as possible and set with a lime green background Print specs: 300 dpi CMYK, layered PSD or vector AI plus flattened TIFF/PNG ready for my printer. Templates in .PSD format and logo in .PNG format will be provided. If any work is needed to scale-up the logo, that is on you. Please show me any past similar work so I can be sure we’re on the same wavelength before we dive in.

title: Banner Cleanup for Social Media
desc: I need someone to clean up my banners for LinkedIn, YouTube, and Facebook. The task involves ensuring the banners are visually appealing and consistent across platforms. Attention to detail and design skills are essential. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and social media marketing.

title: Banner Media Sosial (LinkedIn Banner)
desc: Looking for a clean, professional LinkedIn background banner for a software development company named "ApexTech".Message to convey: Innovation, software solutions, cloud computing, and digital transformation.Colors: Tech blue, white, and dark grey.Text on banner: "Empowering Businesses through Code".Deliverables: Exact LinkedIn dimensions (1584 x 396 pixels) in JPEG/PNG.

title: Bold Lifestyle Thumbnail Design
desc: I’m refreshing my lifestyle-focused YouTube channel and I need thumbnails that instantly pop in the feed. The visual direction is clear: bright, bold and colorful frames that feel upbeat and modern rather than minimalist or overly realistic. Each thumbnail should combine striking color blocks with a concise text overlay that teases the video’s hook without cluttering the image. You’ll receive the video title and a short positioning note for every upload, then it’s your job to pick a vibrant palette, weave in large, legible type, and balance the composition so it still looks great on mobile. I don’t require extra icons or character cut-outs right now—strong typography is the star—though you’re free to layer light graphic accents if they heighten the overall energy. Please provide: • 3 initial thumbnail concepts for the next video (PSD/AI + PNG at 1280×720). • One revision round on the selected concept. • A reusable template setup I can drop new images and text into for future uploads. If these hit the mark, I’ll line up a steady stream of weekly thumbnails. Let me know your turnaround time and drop a quick note on the software you prefer (Photoshop, Illustrator, or equivalent) so we keep the workflow smooth.

title: Bold Product Packaging Card Design
desc: I need a product packaging card designed. The primary purpose of this card is branding and logo display. Requirements: - Design should be bold and colorful - Incorporate our logo prominently - Ensure the design aligns with our brand identity Ideal Skills: - Graphic design experience - Strong portfolio in bold and colorful designs - Proficiency in design software (e.g., Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop) Please share your portfolios and relevant experience.

title: Business Card Design for SaaS Company
desc: Looking for a clean, professional business card design for my corporate event planning software company. Deliverables: - Front and back design - Print-ready files (350dpi, 3.5"×2" with bleed) - Source files (AI or PSD) Brand assets I'll provide: - Logo files (PNG) - Brand color hex codes - Style guide PDF Card details: - Name, title, phone, email, and website will be shared upon hire Vibe: Corporate but not stuffy. Clean, modern, premium feel. Think SaaS/tech meets professional services. Timeline: Few days turnaround Please include examples of business card work in your proposal. Bonus if you have experience with SaaS or tech brands.

title: Canva Design VA - Social Media Content
desc: Job Title: Canva Design VA — Social Media Content About the Role: We're looking for a detail-oriented Canva designer to help produce weekly social media content for our digital marketing agency. You'll work from pre-built templates, swap in client-specific assets like photos and copy, and finalize designs for posting across Instagram, Facebook, and other platforms. This is a part-time role starting at six hours per week with potential to grow as we scale. Key Responsibilities: Import pre-made Canva templates. Add client photos, text, and brand assets. Adjust colors, fonts, or layouts to match brand guidelines. Export final designs in correct formats. Flag any design issues or template problems that need review. Communicate progress and timelines clearly. Required Skills: Proficiency in Canva. Ability to follow templates and brand guidelines precisely. Attention to detail. Reliable communication. Basic understanding of social media content creation. Nice-to-Have Skills: Design thinking and troubleshooting ability. Experience with social media content. Familiarity with Photoshop or similar design tools. Compensation: $6 to $12 dollars per hour, depending on experience. 6 hours per week to start, with the opportunity to expand. Time Commitment: Flexible scheduling, 6 hours per week

title: Color swap on an image
desc: I have these two images. I need to change the colour of the upper portion of the kayak to the following colours. Pick any of the two images and perform the change. Orange: #F87B11 Blue: #317EB4 Red: #FD202B Grey: #F3F2F0 The outcome should be four images with products of the colour mentioned above. Don't try it with AI - all elements need to be unchanged and AI butcher up the pictures, I've tried. Ask if you have questions.

title: Colorful Minimalistic Box Design
desc: I'm looking for a talented graphic designer to create print designs for corrugated boxes. The design should be colorful yet maintain a minimalistic aesthetic. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proficiency in design software (Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, etc.) - Experience in print design, specifically for packaging - Strong understanding of color theory and minimalistic design principles - Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines Please provide a portfolio showcasing relevant work.

title: Colorful Rectangular Packaging Sticker Design
desc: I'm looking for a talented graphic designer to create a vibrant, colorful rectangular sticker for product packaging. Requirements: - Design a colorful, eye-catching rectangular sticker - Provide high-resolution design files - Experience in packaging design is preferred Ideal Skills & Experience: - Proficiency in design software (Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, etc.) - Strong portfolio showcasing colorful designs - Attention to detail and creativity Please share your portfolio with your bids.

title: Colorful Storefront Window Graphics
desc: I need a set of vibrant, eye-catching graphics that will turn my shopfront windows into a giant seasonal billboard. The goal is twofold: reinforce my brand identity (logo, colours, tagline) and highlight our current seasonal product line so passers-by instantly know what’s fresh inside. Here’s what I’m after: • A cohesive design theme spanning three glass panels, each 2 m × 1 m. • Full-bleed, print-ready artwork supplied as layered AI or PDF files, 300 dpi minimum, with crop and bleed marks already set. • Colour palette that pops from the street yet stays true to our brand PMS codes. • Space reserved in the layout for a small QR code the printer will drop in later. Acceptance criteria 1. Final files open flawlessly in Adobe Illustrator 2023. 2. Colours match our supplied brand guide when proofed in CMYK. 3. Text and logos remain razor-sharp when scaled to full window size. 4. A quick mock-up on a shopfront photo is included so I can visualise placement before sending to print. If you’ve designed storefront wraps or large-format vinyl before, I’d love to see a couple of examples. Let’s make this window impossible to ignore!

title: Complete Social Media Graphics Package
desc: I’m revamping my brand’s presence on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter and need a cohesive set of graphics that look sharp on every feed. The job covers everything visual for these three platforms—profile pictures, engaging post images, and eye-catching cover or header photos—each sized and optimized to current platform specifications. Consistency across channels is key, so the colour palette, fonts, and overall style should align seamlessly. If you work in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or even Canva, that’s perfect; just be sure the final files are editable so I can tweak copy or swap photos later if needed. Deliverables • Platform-ready profile pictures (FB, IG, TW) • Post image templates ready for quick text/photo swaps • Cover or header photos formatted to each site’s latest guidelines • Source files (AI/PSD or layered Canva links) plus exported PNG/JPG versions I’ll provide my logo, brand colours, and any reference imagery as soon as we kick off. Let me know your turnaround time and a quick outline of your creative process so we can get started right away.

title: Convert AI Image to SVG for Foil Sticker
desc: I need an AI-generated image converted into a vector SVG format file for printing gold foil stickers. Requirements: - The image is to be used as a logo. - No modifications are needed; I want to keep it as is. - The final output must be in SVG format. Ideal Skills & Experience: - Proficiency in vector graphic software (e.g., Adobe Illustrator). - Experience with SVG file creation. - Attention to detail to ensure high-quality output. Looking forward to your bids!

title: Convert AI Logo to Vector Files
desc: We have an AI-generated draft logo in JPG and PNG formats and need someone to convert it into vector files for scaling without blurring. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and vector graphics to ensure high-quality output. This is a small-scale project requiring entry-level proficiency.

title: Convert Flat Logo to Clean Vector Redraw (AI, SVG, EPS) + Refinements for Brand Use
desc: I have an existing logo concept created (flat design). I am looking for a professional designer to recreate this logo as clean, original vector artwork and refine it for professional use. The goal is to preserve the current concept while improving overall polish, balance, and scalability so the logo is suitable for commercial use and trademark consideration. Scope of Work * Manually recreate the existing logo as fully editable vector artwork (not a simple trace) * Refine spacing, alignment, and typography where needed for a more professional finish * Ensure the final design is clean, original, and not based on Canva assets, templates, or stock elements * Maintain the overall concept and layout while improving visual quality * The wordmark should be designed in a flexible, modular way so it can be reused across future service lines while maintaining consistent brand identity What I will provide * PNG and PDF exports of the current Canva logo * Notes on elements to keep, adjust, or improve Deliverables * Editable vector files: AI, SVG, EPS * High-resolution transparent PNG * Font recommendations or font files (if applicable) * Final logo suitable for scaling, branding, and commercial use Important Requirements * No stock icons or templates * No Canva elements reused in final artwor

desc: I need help taking a logo created on Gemini and making it into a vector file so that it can be used in multiple platforms. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and vector graphics to ensure the logo remains high-quality across different formats.

desc: I’m looking for an experienced professional to fix the design of a clear, visually appealing organizational chart that represents my workflow and processes. This is not just a basic org chart—I need someone who understands workflow structuring, process mapping, and visual hierarchy to turn my ideas into a clean, easy-to-understand diagram. **What I Need:** * A complete organizational/workflow chart based on my provided information * Clear structure showing roles, steps, and dependencies * Clean, modern, and professional design * Easy-to-edit final file and easy to print. It’ll probably be split over five pages. * Ability to simplify complex processes into a clear visual **Your Responsibilities:** * Understand my workflow (I will provide details, notes, or rough ideas) * Suggest improvements or better structuring if needed * Design the chart in a way that is easy to follow and scalable **Ideal Candidate:** * Experience with workflow diagrams, org charts, or business process mapping * Strong visual design sense * Able to communicate clearly and ask the right questions **Bonus (Not Required):** * Experience working with startups or digital workflows * Knowledge of automation or operational systems **To Apply:** Please include: 1. Examples of similar charts or diagrams you’ve created

title: Create a pixel perfect icon for my app
desc: I have a pretty well-refined image that I need to turn into an app icon. I need sizes from 32x32 to 512x512, and the image needs to be vectorized and simplified in order to scale well at all these resolutions. Don't reply unless you have specific expertise in icon design. NDA is required.
